def: A variety of aragonite, occuring in delicate white coralloidalforms; -- common in beds of iron ore.
An aëroplane with two main supporting surfaces one above theother.
Having a single heart, as fishes and amphibians.-- n.
Clustered in grains at intervals; grumous.
In a manner or to a degree beyond endurance; intolerably; as, ablaze insufferably bright; a person insufferably proud.
Surrounding, or situated about, the petals.
A rustic house or apartment in a garden or park, to be used asa pleasure resort in summer. Shak.
Of, pertaining to, or resembling, the Corybantes or theirrites; frantic; frenzied; as, a corybantic dance.
The quantity or number which fills a tree.

Of, pertaining to, or discovered by, Meibomius. Meibomianglands, the slender sebaceous glands of the eyelids, which discharge,through minute orifices in the edges of the lids, a fatty secretionserving to lubricate the adjacent parts.
